summary: Iteration 61 - Comprehensive E2E test after LLM balance top-up. All major features tested successfully: Backend APIs (13/14 pass), Delete AlertDialog modals, AI Progress Analysis button, Dashboard/CaseDetail UI, Public pages, Scroll-to-top buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx: Delete button uses AlertDialog correctly (line 680-696), red styling applied
CaseDetail.jsx: Delete Case button (line 612-621) uses AlertDialog (line 1412-1428), red styling on Delete Case button in header
ReportsSection.jsx: Delete Report button (line 319-331) triggers AlertDialog (line 526-542)
FastScrollTop.jsx: Both ScrollToTopOnNav and FastScrollTop components working (lines 7-54), data-testids correct
All ReactMarkdown link components have target='_blank', rel='noopener noreferrer', blue underline styling

success_rate.backend: 93% - 13/14 tests passed (1 minor endpoint path issue)

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test case 'Delete Me Case'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified comprehensive E2E flow. All delete operations use AlertDialog (not window.confirm). AI Progress Analysis button on Progress tab has gradient purple styling and is functional. Scroll-to-top and Home floating buttons appear after scrolling >420px. All public pages (FAQ, Legal, How It Works, Forms, Glossary, Lawyers) load correctly.

login_flow_mobile.detail: Get Started -> Auth Modal -> Login -> Terms Accept -> Dashboard

dashboard_delete_button.detail: Red trash button visible on case cards, triggers AlertDialog

case_detail_delete_button.detail: Red 'Delete Case' button in header, triggers AlertDialog

case_detail_tabs.detail: All 7 tabs present: Documents, Timeline, Grounds, Notes, Reports, Legal, Progress

ai_progress_button.detail: Gradient purple button 'AI Analyse Progress' on Progress tab

alertdialog_modals.detail: Dashboard delete, CaseDetail delete, Report delete all use AlertDialog

scroll_to_top_buttons.detail: Both scroll-to-top (blue) and Home (dark) buttons visible after scroll

public_pages.detail: FAQ (33 answers), Forms (30 templates), Glossary (84 terms), Lawyers (8 states), How It Works (7 steps), Legal Resources all loading
